descriptions.value: lilishop has a missing authorization vulnerability in PUT /store/clerk/{ownStoreClerkId}, /store/clerk*, isSuper/roleIds/departmentId, /store/roleMenu/{roleId}, /store/departmentRole/{departmentId}, /store/clerk/enable/{clerkId}. An authenticated attacker can perform authorization-sensitive operations through PUT /store/clerk/{ownStoreClerkId}, /store/clerk*, isSuper/roleIds/departmentId, /store/roleMenu/{roleId}, /store/departmentRole/{departmentId}, /store/clerk/enable/{clerkId} without the required permission.

supportingMedia.value:
lilishop has a missing authorization vulnerability in PUT /store/clerk/{ownStoreClerkId}, /store/clerk*, isSuper/roleIds/departmentId, /store/roleMenu/{roleId}, /store/departmentRole/{departmentId}, /store/clerk/enable/{clerkId}. An authenticated attacker can perform authorization-sensitive operations through PUT /store/clerk/{ownStoreClerkId}, /store/clerk*, isSuper/roleIds/departmentId, /store/roleMenu/{roleId}, /store/departmentRole/{departmentId}, /store/clerk/enable/{clerkId} without the required permission.

This issue affects lilishop.
